narrative:
Catawba Island 4 (precinct in Ottawa County) has 833 registered voters, with 43.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.6 percentage points.
